_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/Makefile.am.planningNote: Autotools source list. digiTS registers components via src/core/registry.ts; no autotools build. PLANNING.md 5 case (a). Both hunks drop the deleted C-heap files bjtdest.c / bjtmdel.c.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjt.c.planningNote: IFparm BJTmPTable model param-name table. Counterpart is BJT_SPICE_L1_PARAM_DEFS (defineModelParams). Per-hunk: the BJT_COMPAT comment block is C-comment plumbing; the new v41 model-param rows (ibe/ibc, rco/vo/gamma/qco, tiss1/2, quasimod/vg/cn/d, ic/ib/pd/te_max/rth0) and alias-flag rows PORT onto the param defs.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtacld.c.planningNote: AC small-signal load (BJTacLoad). AC is implemented engine-wide (analysis-scope.md: ac-analysis.ts, defaultStampAcHandler, optional AnalogElement.stampAc hook). BjtL1Element has NO stampAc method yet -> all three hunks blocked by reconstruction bjt#recon/stampAc; the v41 collCX AC stamps ride on top as ordinary deltas.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtask.c.planningNote: BJTask - instance/operating-point IFparm value getter. digiTS has no IFparm ask API. Every case is a getter with no digiTS counterpart; the v41 * BJTtype polarity factor and the new COLLCXNODE case live only inside this absent API. All hunks NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtconv.c.planningNote: BJTconvTest - per-NR convergence test. digiTS folds the cchat/cbhat convergence prediction inline into BjtL1Element.load (bjtload.c:331-337 cite at bjt.ts). The v41 delta adds the vbcx/delvbcx prediction for the internal-collector-resistance node. PORT.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtdefs.h.planningNote: Instance/model structs + state-vector macros + ID enums. Counterparts: BJT_L1_SCHEMA (state slots), BJT_SPICE_L1_PARAM_DEFS + the params bag. Per-hunk: GENinstance/GENmodel embedding, const node-id qualifiers, define->enum reformat and the noise-source-index enum are C mechanics; the new state slots (vbcx/vrci/qbcx/irci_*), the BEtSatCur/BCtSatCur split, tf2/3/6/7, the collCX node + matrix pointers and new model fields are v41-additive structure that maps onto the schema/param defs.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtdel.c.planningNote: C-heap free. v41 reduces BJTdelete to FREE(inst->BJTsens) (sensitivity scratch). digiTS is GC-managed and has no sensitivity (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (a).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtdest.c.planningNote: Whole-file deletion of BJTdestroy - a C-heap free loop releasing every model/instance. digiTS is GC-managed. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md 5 case (a).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtdisto.c.planningNote: BJTdisto - distortion (Volterra-kernel) analysis load. Distortion is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtdset.c.planningNote: BJTdSetup - distortion-analysis setup (computes Volterra EqualDeriv terms). Distortion is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b). The area-removal here mirrors the DC change but lives entirely inside the distortion setup.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtext.h.planningNote: C extern-prototype header. Hunks remove the BJTdestroy/BJTmDelete prototypes (deleted heap funcs), change BJTdelete signature, drop a register qualifier. digiTS has no prototype headers. PLANNING.md 5 case (a).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtgetic.c.planningNote: BJTgetic - DEVsetic initial-condition seeding. digiTS seeds IC inside BjtL1Element.load under MODEUIC from ICVBE/ICVCE (bjt.ts:1442-1456). The single hunk is purely the linked-list-walk accessor rename; the IC body is unchanged v26->v41 and has no separate digiTS getic method. NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtinit.c.planningNote: SPICEdev BJTinfo dispatch struct -> C99 designated initializers. digiTS registers via the component registry; method binding is the class. All non-NULL func-ptr assignments preserved; only DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set NULL (deleted heap funcs). No new param slot / default / capability. PLANNING.md 5 case (a) / 4 glue note.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtload.c.planningNote: Transient/DC companion load (BJTload). Counterpart is BjtL1Element.load (createSpiceL1BjtElement). v41 deltas: area-scaling relocation, separate ibe/ibc leakage, substrate-current BJTsubSatCurGiven gating, ttype=type*subs, and the new Kull quasi-saturation / internal-collector-resistance block (vrci/vbcx/Irci/Qbci + collCX stamps). All PENDING onto the existing v26 Gummel-Poon load.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtmask.c.planningNote: BJTmAsk - model-param IFparm value getter. digiTS has no model-param ask API. Every hunk is a getter case with no digiTS counterpart. All NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtmdel.c.planningNote: Whole-file deletion of BJTmDelete - a C-heap free unlinking a model. GC language; no model destructor/linked list. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md 5 case (a).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtmpar.c.planningNote: BJTmParam - model-param setter. Counterpart is the params bag populated via props.getModelParam (+ setParam). The new v41 cases PORT as new param wiring; the removed C2/C4 cases are the alias collapse. All PENDING.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtnoise.c.planningNote: BJTnoise - noise analysis. Noise is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtparam.c.planningNote: BJTparam - instance-param setter. Counterpart is BjtL1Element.setParam / the instance params. Both hunks are cosmetic (switch whitespace, FALLTHROUGH comments); logic byte-identical. All NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtpzld.c.planningNote: BJTpzLoad - pole-zero load (SPcomplex *s stamps). Pole-zero is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b). Includes the v41 collCX PZ stamps, all inside the PZ-only body.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsacl.c.planningNote: BJTsAcLoad - sensitivity AC load. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/senParmNo in src/). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsetup.c.planningNote: Matrix-pointer alloc + model default-value processing + state sizing (BJTsetup). Counterpart is BjtL1Element.setup. v41 deltas: BEsatCur/BCsatCur defaults, the active c2/c4>1e-4 IS-scaling, intCollResist/epi/quasimod/tiss/SOA defaults, the new collCX-node allocation (CKTmkVolt) and the collCX TSTALLOC block. BJTunsetup has no digiTS counterpart (GC) - handled per-hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsload.c.planningNote: BJTsLoad - sensitivity load. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsoachk.c.planningNote: BJTsoaCheck - safe-operating-area check. SOA is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no soaCheck method, no CKTsoaMaxWarns analogue). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsprt.c.planningNote: BJTsPrint - sensitivity debug printout. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b). Pure stdout.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsset.c.planningNote: BJTsSetup - sensitivity setup (assigns BJTsenParmNo into info->SENparms). Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjtsupd.c.planningNote: BJTsUpdate - sensitivity update. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjttemp.c.planningNote: Temperature / default-value processing (BJTtemp). Counterpart is BjtL1Element.computeTemperature + computeBjtTempParams. v41 deltas: separate BEtSatCur/BCtSatCur, area-folding relocated into temp, f2/f3/f6/f7 lifted to per-instance temperature-dependent, mje/mjc/mjs 0.999 clamps, separate nominal-temp band-gap (pbfact1/egfet1/vtnom), intCollResist quasimod temperature adjust. All PENDING.

src/spicelib/devices/bjt/bjttrunc.c.planningNote: BJTtrunc - LTE/timestep contribution. Counterpart is BjtL1Element.getLteTimestep (cktTerr over qbe/qbc/qsub). v41 adds the qbcx term under intCollResistGiven. PORT.

bjt/bjtext.h#h001.rationale: C extern-prototype header: removes the BJTdestroy/BJTmDelete prototypes (deleted heap funcs) and changes BJTdelete signature. digiTS has no prototype headers.

bjt/bjtext.h#h002.rationale: C extern-prototype header: drops a register qualifier on BJTdSetup prototype. digiTS has no prototype headers; BJTdSetup itself is distortion (NO-COUNTERPART).

bjt/bjtgetic.c#h001.rationale: BJTgetic only v41 change is the linked-list-walk accessor rename (model->BJTnextModel -> BJTnextModel(model)); the IC body is byte-identical v26->v41. digiTS seeds IC inline in load() and has no separate getic method or model/instance linked list to rename.

bjt/bjtinit.c#h001.rationale: SPICEdev BJTinfo dispatch struct -> C99 designated initializers. digiTS registers via the component registry; method binding is the class. All non-NULL func-ptr assignments preserved; only DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set NULL (deleted heap funcs). No new param slot / default / capability.

bjt/bjtparam.c#h002.rationale: Adds /* FALLTHROUGH */ source comments on the BJT_IC case to suppress -Wimplicit-fallthrough. C-comment-only; IC handling logic byte-identical v26->v41.

bjt/bjtpzld.c#h001.rationale: BJTpzLoad is the pole-zero load (SPcomplex *s stamps); pole-zero is not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

bjt/bjtsacl.c#h001.rationale: BJTsAcLoad is the sensitivity AC load (info->SENstatus, BJTsenGpi perturbation vectors); sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/senParmNo in src/).

bjt/bjtsacl.c#h002.rationale: BJTsAcLoad is the sensitivity AC load (info->SENstatus, BJTsenGpi perturbation vectors); sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/senParmNo in src/).

bjt/bjtsetup.c#h009.rationale: BJTunsetup - the model-walk that frees the internal prime/collCX nodes. digiTS is GC-managed and allocates internal nodes at compile-time expansion; there is no element unsetup pass to free them. The hunk is the v41 reordering of that C node-free walk.

bjt/bjtsload.c#h001.rationale: BJTsLoad is the sensitivity load; sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

bjt/bjtsload.c#h002.rationale: Removes a duplicated CKTstate1 restore inside BJTsLoad; the whole function is sensitivity-only and sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

bjt/bjtsprt.c#h001.rationale: BJTsPrint is sensitivity debug stdout; sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

bjt/bjtsset.c#h001.rationale: BJTsSetup assigns BJTsenParmNo into info->SENparms; sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

bjt/bjtsupd.c#h001.rationale: BJTsUpdate recomputes charge sensitivities into the SENstruct; sensitivity is not implemented (analysis-scope.md).

bjt/bjttrunc.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/bjt.ts - BjtL1Element.getLteTimestep (cktTerr over qbe/qbc/qsub; v41 adds qbcx under intCollResistGiven)

bjt#recon/stampAc.title: Rebuild BJTacLoad as BjtL1Element.stampAc (the linearized small-signal AC stamp: gpi/gmu/gm/go/gx conductances + jw*{cqbe,cqbc,cqbx,cqsub,cexbc} capacitive susceptances into the BJT matrix cells)
bjt#recon/stampAc.tsFunction: src/components/semiconductors/bjt.ts - BjtL1Element.stampAc (no allocation in stampAc; reuse matrix handles allocated once in setup(), mirroring the BJTsetup TSTALLOC / BJTacLoad pure-stamp function boundary); reads the gpi/gmu/gm/go/gx and cqbe/cqbc/cqbx/cqsub/cexbc state slots that load() already populates

bjt#recon/quasiSaturation.title: BJT Kull quasi-saturation subsystem + v41 area/Arrhenius temperature refactor + full TLEV/TLEVC temperature parity
bjt#recon/quasiSaturation.tsFunction: BJT QS subsystem (collCX node + state slots + Kull load/acld/conv + area/Arrhenius/TLEV temp)

bjt#recon/soaWarnings.title: BJT safe-operating-area diagnostic warnings (BJTsoaCheck) — read-only, no matrix/RHS effect; deferred follow-on
